preparations: Enaimon undulata preparations may be used in traditional medicine, though there is a lack of concrete evidence to support their effectiveness. Preparations can vary in form, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, depending on the desired application and the culture's traditional methods. The plant's properties are thought to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, but the extent to which these properties are realized in herbal preparations is unclear. More research is needed to fully understand the potential benefits and risks of using Enaimon undulata in herbal remedies. The preparation and use of Enaimon undulata should only be done under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional.
